Instance Property# accessibilityContainer

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
weak var accessibilityContainer: AnyObject? { get set }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement/accessibilitycontainer#discussion)

The accessibility ancestor of this element.

This may be used by accessibility technologies to traverse from the remote element to the elements above it in the hierarchy.
